title: The Case of the Carrot-Loving Gophers
summary: Rizzo the Rat and Miss Piggy team up with Kitty the Superhero to investigate the secret lives of gophers. Wearing special protective suits and armed with a map, they discover a hidden tunnel inhabited by Goober the Gopher and his sister Luba. The group is treated to a tour of a lush vegetable garden, where they learn that gophers aren't dangerous—they're just hungry for snacks like carrots and snap peas. After sharing an apple from the winter's farmers market, the adventurers part ways as the gophers settle in for a nap.

highlightQuote.text: Silly me, but I never know when one will pop out and try to nibble my pants.

transcript.text: Mickey, are your teeth still coming in? Ahh...
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: They are?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh yeah, Mickey's teeth are coming in. Tell a story about Animal.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Animal?
Animal and Rizzo.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Animal and Rizzo. Well, once upon a time...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually Miss Piggy and Rizzo.
Oh Miss Piggy and Rizzo. Okay.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong, Miss Piggy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Miss Piggy says, "Who is it?"
Um, Rizzo the rat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh hello, my old friend, come on in. Hello! What have you been up to, Rizzo?
I have been up to just having a nature walk and like exploring and like collecting rocks. And there's one shiny silver one at the bottom.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: A shiny silver one? That sounds very interesting. Could we look at it?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah, yeah, but we got to dig through all these rocks.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Wow, where did you find these?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I found them just on the sidewalk.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Avery's crying. I think she's okay. I think she'll quiet down by herself.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Rizzo says, "I've got my own pink yo-yo."
A pink yo-yo? Can I try it?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.
Thank you. And she yo-yoed the yo-yo up and down. Vroom, vroom, vroom.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Rizzo says to Miss Piggy, "Another friend of mine, who is a great friend of mine, is Kitty the superhero and her cat crew Pumpkin and all the other cat crew parts are going on an adventure to investigate a gopher."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "A gopher?" says Miss Piggy. "Why does the gopher need investigating?"
Because it's a never-been-explored animal.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh. Well, may I join you all on this adventure?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah. I was planning to do that. Oh, but it's pretty like halfway to the clock tower near her house and halfway near her school. Halfway near her school and halfway near the clock tower. So that's where I'm headed to.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's go. Mama's just coming up to check on Avery because she's crying.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Rizzo says, "For me to look ready, I gotta wear my gopher protector outfit."
"Oh, that's a good idea," says Miss Piggy. "I better wear mine too. Now wait a minute, what is a gopher protector outfit?"
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: It's something that protects you from the gophers.
Oh, how does it work?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: It works like, if you tie it.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, you gotta tie it on. I see.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: So the way you do it, Miss Piggy, is this way. You put on your pants and then you pull it and then you tie it under your pants and then that's it.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay, I'll try it. Pull, pull, pull, tie, tie, tie. Ah, there we go.
Oh yeah, there we go. Now we're headed toward the clock tower and Kitty's school because that's where the gophers are. Because that's where the gopher family lives.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's go. Lead the way.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey, it's this way, follow me Miss Piggy. So then she went halfway to the clock tower and Kitty gave me a map. And she said halfway to the clock tower, halfway to her school, then around and across the street, go downwards, around a big rock, and then you're there at the gopher tunnel. That's what she said.
Hmm, let's try it. And so they did all those things and they went around the big rock. And what did they see?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: The gopher tunnel, of course.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh. And who peeked in the gopher tunnel first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Rizzo. Rizzo did first, and then Miss Piggy did next.
Oh dear, it's all dark in there. I don't see any gophers. Did you see a gopher, Rizzo?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I saw only one. One tiny gopher.
Oh, maybe it was a baby gopher.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Kitty is on her way and she gave me a message to be careful.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, why must we be careful?
Because they're very big and small animals, the gophers might eat. That's why she gave me a message to be careful for.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: I see.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: And she says, "Always beware," in the message, "beware of wearing your gopher protective suits the whole time."
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, oh, I see. Are you still wearing yours? I'm still wearing mine.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: I'm still wearing mine.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Good.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now we also need a gopher net, Kitty said. I've got mine, where's yours?
Oh dear, I forgot my gopher net. Could we share a gopher net?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah, let's share this one.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh good, thank you. Now are we going to use that to try to catch a gopher?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Nope, nope, it's just to catch anything that would bite us.
Oh, but the gopher wouldn't bite us, would he?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Nope, they're friendly gophers in this tunnel. This is just my bug catcher for in case there's any dirt spilling into our sneakers.
Into our sneakers? That's very convenient. Now let's wait for a gopher. Now be very quiet now.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Okay, very quiet. Shh.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Scratchy, scratchy... What's that sound? Are you a gopher?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Who me? Uh, no, I just live in this gopher tunnel and I look like a gopher, but I'm not a gopher. Oh, actually I am a gopher.

Oh, hello gopher! We were waiting for gophers. This was for if there's any sand in our sneakers. But it looks a lot like a gopher catching net to me. You weren't planning on catching any gophers, were you? Because I'm gonna run away if you're gonna try to catch me.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Well, I'm not gonna try to because you would be alone in that net. Would you like to learn anything about gophers? Well, we're just here to have a few snacks and play a little. And Kitty the superhero's on her way.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what's she going to do?
She's going to just investigate a little bit about your tunnel and investigate a little bit about your gopher life. She wants to know about what gophers eat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: What gophers eat? Oh, well, I could tell you all about that.
Well, well, well, my name is Rizzo the rat.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Nice to meet you. My name is Goober the gopher.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And my name is Miss Piggy.
Well nice to meet you. Can I give you a little tour of the garden outside my tunnel?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, yeah! Ding dong! Kitty and her cat crew.
Oh, hello Kitty! said Goober the gopher.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Hello, I want to talk to you about what gophers eat and just investigate your tunnel and garden.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Well, I was just about to give everyone a tour of this beautiful garden just outside my tunnel here over in these raised beds. Would you like to come?
And I brought baby Mickey with me just because I gotta keep track of her always.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Well baby Mickey is welcome to join the tour. Now, if you'll step right over here you'll see that my tunnel is conveniently located just a few feet away from this lush raised bed garden with lots of vegetables growing in it. I nibble on the vegetables because they're delicious.
What is that? When?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Whenever I feel like it. When I'm a little hungry, I just wander right over to this garden because it's right outside my tunnel and then look here. Underneath the dirt they've got these long orange things. They're delicious carrots. Crunch, crunch, crunch.
Well, I've got farmers market apple. I brought them in a bag for me to eat. And if you want to share one, gopher, they're very tasty.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh thank you, may I have one? Crunch, crunch, munch. Thank you, that was a delicious apple.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, it was from the winter's farmers market, though. And there's donuts.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Donuts? What are those?
They're things with sprinkles and frosting. Now I'm wearing my gopher protector outfit.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Well that's good, you never know when a dangerous gopher could come out. Wait a minute, I'm a gopher. I'm not dangerous, I just like to eat vegetables.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Wait, is that dangerous gopher I see? Ah, right beside you.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's just my sister gopher.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Silly me, but I never know when one will pop out and try to nibble my pants.
Well you know what? This is my sister Luba. And you know what she's gonna nibble? Some carrots. Because there's lots of fresh carrots growing in this garden.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: There isn't any carrots in my garden in the winter. There's only them in the summer.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: I see. It sounds like you have a nice garden. I'd love to visit someday.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yeah, but don't get into my green bean protective place without asking, please. And the vegetables are hiding in between the flowers. And do not nibble on the flower petals as long as you ask me.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Now what kind of vegetables are in there?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Um, carrots, snap peas, green beans, radishes. Well, there's also marigolds.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: That sounds wonderful. Well, that's the end of our garden tour. Me and my sister Luba have to go back in our hole and take a nap. So now we'll say bye-bye.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That's the end of our stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And that's the end of our stars and stories. Were you wearing yours?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I was.
I was.
transcript.speaker: Dad

characters.name: Rizzo the Rat
characters.description: A friendly rat who enjoys nature walks, collecting rocks, and exploring the outdoors.

characters.name: Miss Piggy
characters.description: Rizzo's old friend who joins him on an adventure to investigate a gopher tunnel.

characters.name: Kitty the Superhero
characters.description: An adventurous superhero who leads a cat crew and investigates animal habitats.

characters.name: Pumpkin
characters.description: A student of Ginger Catasorry and veteran of Kitty the Superhero’s specialized troop, this feline translates the tactical intuition of dark gopher tunnels into rigorous academic study. Despite their combat experience, they harbor a paralyzing fear of being eaten by their subterranean foes—initially trembling at the mere sight of the big gopher—a dread that frequently sends the scholar scurrying to hide between Izzy’s legs for sanctuary.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Goober the Gopher
characters.description: A friendly, non-dangerous gopher who lives in a tunnel and loves nibbling on garden vegetables.

characters.name: Luba
characters.description: Goober's sister gopher who shares his love for garden carrots.

characters.name: The Cat Crew
characters.description: Kitty the Superhero's group of feline companions who assist in her adventures.

places.name: The Clock Tower
places.description: A central landmark near Kitty's house used as a navigation point.

places.name: Kitty's House
places.description: Perched in the rhythmic shadow of the nearby clock tower, Kitty the Superhero’s residence serves as both a domestic haven and the tactical launchpad for her family. It was within these walls, amidst the warmth of a final shared lunch, that the heroes gathered to begin their latest adventure.

places.name: The School
places.description: An educational building that serves as a landmark on the way to the gopher tunnel.

places.name: The Big Rock
places.description: A large stone used as a final guidepost to find the entrance to the gopher habitat.

places.name: The Gopher Tunnel
places.description: A sprawling labyrinth of cool, earthen tunnels serves as the shadowed sanctuary for a hospitable gopher family. This subterranean network acts as a clandestine meeting ground, where Kitty and Uncle Grisco navigate the dark to consult with their burrowing allies.

places.name: The Raised Bed Garden
places.description: A lush garden filled with carrots, snap peas, and radishes, maintained by humans but visited by gophers.
